pass_criteria: Deterministic artifact contract passes including output.txt presence.
Visible mass-balance and cohort ledger checks pass (no negative inventories, correct timing).
Scenario and sensitivity tables substantiate ALT-B and single-week expedite choices.
Executive KPIs reconcile to workbook and memo.

pass_criteria: Deterministic artifact contract passes including output.txt presence.
Visible mass-balance and cohort ledger checks pass (no negative inventories, correct timing).
Scenario and sensitivity tables substantiate ALT-B and single-week expedite choices.
Executive KPIs reconcile to workbook and memo.

planned_changes: Add output.txt containing: (a) executive KPI rollup; (b) weekly shipments/backlog by channel for MRB-denied and MRB-approved; (c) total costs per scenario; (d) EV overlay; (e) expedite-week usage and rationale.
Workbook: create Mass-Balance sheet with per-week checks (Beg Inv + Releases - Shipments = End Inv) by cohort and total; add conditional formatting for pass/fail.

Workbook: add Traceability Ledger sheet for cohorts (clean/missing-chart/SD-44) including coupon start/finish, ALT-B qualification consumption (4 units), and eligibility gates; show week-available quantities by cohort.
Workbook: add Scenarios sheet (MRB-denied vs MRB-approved) with side-by-side weekly tables covering AOG/OEM/Cert shipments, backlog, penalties, and total costs.
Workbook: add Sensitivity sheet with (i) ALT-B now vs never breakeven; (ii) expedite NDT sensitivity for weeks 3-6; highlight the optimal policy and show no double counting.
Workbook: add Executive Summary one-pager with linked KPIs and a data dictionary; ensure all figures trace to Inputs and Scenario sheets.
Expose constraints via named ranges and readable formulas: HT caps weeks 1-3, ALT-B net availability from week 3, final inspection/NDT caps, and expedite increments.
Add guardrails/validation to prevent disallowed flows (e.g., AOG from missing-chart; SD-44 to OEM/AOG before MRB approval); include boolean checks surfaced on Exec Summary.
Memo: append a short audit section echoing mass-balance totals, cohort ledger tallies, and the sensitivity outcomes to remain evaluable without spreadsheet rendering.
Link all totals in output.txt and memo to workbook values to keep numbers consistent across artifacts.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Address deliverable mismatch (missing output.txt) and strengthen auditability/transparency to reduce reliance on workbook rendering and solidify constraint/cost evidence.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Strong, compliant plan and artifacts; grading passed with a high score. However, there is a deliverable mismatch (missing required output.txt), and several transparency/auditability gaps reduce confidence: no explicit per-week mass-balance checks, no traceability ledger by cohort, limited scenario/sensitivity visibility (ALT-B breakeven and expedite-week sensitivity), and no single-page executive KPI rollup. Workbook formulas were not verifiable in-line by the grader due to preview limitations; surfacing checks in the memo and a minimal text deliverable will harden evidence.
